items.title: Families calling out to loved ones trapped in rubble by Venezuela quakes
items.summary: In La Guaira, desperate families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their relatives are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

items.title: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
items.summary: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

items.title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
items.summary: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.
